Twisted (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,195,050Details
International Box Office $14,924,798
Worldwide Box Office $40,119,848
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,904,299 (35.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,703 opening theaters/2,704 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $48,523,801

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 27th, 2004 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: May 20th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 31st, 2004 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for violence, language and sexuality
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: Betrayal, Death of a Girlfriend / Boyfriend, Death of a Mentor, Death of a Partner, Dysfunctional Family, Faked Suicide, Faulty Memory, Murder - Suicide, One Night Stand, Police Detective, Serial Killer, Surprise Twist, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Film Noir, Foster Family
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Kopelson Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
